ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code representing the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Total area of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subdivision_hospitals" (
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subdivision hospital record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the subdivision is located */,
  "hospital_count" INTEGER /* Count of hospitals in the subdivision */,
  "subdivision_name" TEXT /* Name of the subdivision */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., government, private, non-profit) */,
  "hospital_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subdivision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subdivision_hospitals_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_hospitals" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district hospital record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "hospital_count" INTEGER /* Count of hospitals in the district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., government, private, non-profit) */,
  "hospital_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_hospitals_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobile_medical_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile medical unit record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the units are available */,
  "unit_count" INTEGER /* Count of mobile medical units in the state */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of mobile medical unit (e.g., emergency response, primary care) */,
  "unit_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobile_medical_units_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "district_area" REAL /* Total area of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subdivision_details" (
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subdivision */,
  "subdivision_name" TEXT /* Name of the subdivision */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the subdivision belongs to */,
  "subdivision_population" INTEGER /* Population of the subdivision */,
  "subdivision_area" REAL /* Total area of the subdivision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subdivision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subdivision_details_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., regional manager, data analyst) */,
  "admin_designation" TEXT /* Designation of the administrator (e.g., regional manager, data analyst) */,
  "admin_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital to which resources are allocated */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mobile unit associated with the allocation */,
  "allocated_resources" TEXT /* Description of allocated resources */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of allocation */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of allocation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES mobile_medical_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES subdivision_hospitals ("subdivision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator assigned to the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare administrator, policy maker, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES healthcare_administrators ("admin_id")
)
